positive: A majestic, stylized forest creature—a blend of fox, owl, and moonlit foliage—perched atop a stylized, bioluminescent crescent moon. The creature has glowing sapphire eyes and flowing, ethereal tails composed of abstract leaves and glowing smoke. The background is a deep indigo night sky filled with minimalistic constellations and stylized nebulae. The composition is a central, symmetrical silhouette suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Art style is celestial gothic, inspired by Art Nouveau and enamel etching, with strong, defined black outlines, vivid cool tones (deep blues, sapphire, emerald), and excellent contrast. Highly detailed, vector-graphic quality, perfect for apparel printing.
negative: photorealistic, bokeh, blur, watermark, signature, text, logo, messy background, poor anatomy, low contrast, muddy colors, noise, grain, extra limbs, abstract clutter
